title: Count Zero Request Servers
titleCn: 统计没有收到请求的服务器数目

testcases.input: n = 3, logs = [[1,3],[2,6],[1,5]], x = 5, queries = [10,11] Output: [1,2] Explanation: For queries[0]: The servers with ids 1 and 2 get requests in the duration of [5, 10]. Hence, only server 3 gets zero requests. For queries[1]: Only the server with id 2 gets a request in duration of [6,11]. Hence, the servers with ids 1 and 3 are the only servers that do not receive any requests during that time period.
testcases.expectedOutput: [1,2] Explanation: For queries[0]: The servers with ids 1 and 2 get requests in the duration of [5, 10]. Hence, only server 3 gets zero requests. For queries[1]: Only the server with id 2 gets a request in duration of [6,11]. Hence, the servers with ids 1 and 3 are the only servers that do not receive any requests during that time period.

testcases.input: n = 3, logs = [[2,4],[2,1],[1,2],[3,1]], x = 2, queries = [3,4] Output: [0,1] Explanation: For queries[0]: All servers get at least one request in the duration of [1, 3]. For queries[1]: Only server with id 3 gets no request in the duration [2,4].
testcases.expectedOutput: [0,1] Explanation: For queries[0]: All servers get at least one request in the duration of [1, 3]. For queries[1]: Only server with id 3 gets no request in the duration [2,4].
